products.name: Leo Celebration Lion
products.description: A gentle lion with a big heart and birthday spirit.
products.longDescription: Leo loves birthdays, warm hugs and joining every celebration. With his soft mane and calm smile, he is the kind of plush friend that feels ready for both gift tables and bedtime cuddles.
products.careInstructions: Hand wash gently and air dry.
features: Soft mane with a warm golden tone
Perfect for birthday gifts and cuddle corners
A calm personality made for cozy evenings

products.name: Luna Party Bunny
products.description: A cuddly bunny for wishes, giggles and cake.
products.longDescription: Luna is a cheerful party bunny with floppy ears, a gentle smile and a look that fits perfectly on a birthday table. She is made for sweet moments, tiny adventures and soft bedtime company.
products.careInstructions: Spot clean or hand wash when needed.
features: Floppy ears and a soft pastel look
Lightweight and easy to carry around
A playful gift for birthdays and sleepovers

products.name: Milo Birthday Bear
products.description: A soft bear with a party hat and a heart full of hugs.
products.longDescription: Milo is the classic birthday bear of the collection. He brings a soft teddy look, a friendly face and just enough celebration energy to feel special without ever being too loud.
products.careInstructions: Hand wash gently and reshape while drying.
features: Classic teddy bear shape with birthday charm
Super cuddly body and soft rounded paws
A lovely choice for gifting or display

products.name: Nori Birthday Whale
products.description: A tiny ocean friend bringing waves of birthday joy.
products.longDescription: Nori is a little whale with a calm ocean mood and a playful birthday spirit. The rounded shape and soothing colors make this plushie feel extra gentle and easy to love.
products.careInstructions: Hand wash only and dry flat.
features: Rounded whale shape that feels easy to hug
Great for ocean-themed gifts and calm decor
Soft pastel look with a playful personality

products.name: Rosie Wish Unicorn
products.description: A soft pink unicorn with a fluffy mane, golden horn and a sweet smile.
products.longDescription: Rosie adds a little fantasy to the collection with a fluffy mane, a golden horn and a warm pink palette. She is made for dreamy gift moments, cute shelf styling and everyday snuggles.
products.material: Polyester plush with fluffy mane details
products.careInstructions: Spot clean and brush mane gently after drying.
features: Golden horn and soft fantasy styling
Fluffy mane with a playful pastel palette
A sweet gift for magical birthdays

products.name: Gus Gentle Gorilla
products.description: A soft and gentle gorilla with big cuddly arms and plenty of warm hugs.
products.longDescription: Gus is the big-hearted plushie of the wild friends group. He has a calm presence, extra cuddly arms and a gentle look that makes him feel comforting from the very first hug.
products.material: Soft polyester plush with extra filling
products.careInstructions: Hand wash carefully and air dry.
features: Larger size with extra cuddly arms
Made for big hugs and cozy reading corners
